title: GG Hardcore SMP
body:
## GG HardcoreSMP Modpack
The GG HardcoreSMP modpack enhances your Minecraft experience by improving performance, adding useful quality-of-life features, and introducing some extra flair to keep things exciting. It’s built to ensure smoother gameplay and better navigation while still preserving the essence of Minecraft.

### ⭐ Key Features:
--



**🔋 Performance Boosts:**

- Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore improve FPS and game performance.
- Entity Culling reduces lag by only rendering visible entities.
- Enhanced Block Entities: Improves block entity rendering for better performance and cleaner visuals.

**🎨 Visual Enhancements:**

- Iris Shaders for beautiful visuals without lag.
- Zoomify: Adds smooth, adjustable zoom.
- Fresh Animations: Smooth, dynamic mob animations that bring the world to life
- Not Enough Animations: Adds extra player animations for a more immersive experience.

**🗺️ UI & Gameplay:**

- Xaero’s Minimap and World Map help with navigation.
- AppleSkin: Clear food and hunger indicators.
- Simple Voice Chat for easy communication with friends.

This modpack is built specifically for Hardcore SMP, focused on performance, visual improvements, and smoother gameplay.

**🎨 Note:
Make sure to enable the "Fresh Animations and Continuity" resource packs in your settings for the full experience!**
